name: Melbourne Cricket Ground
tagline: A broad, multi-gate venue where timing the break and exit flow matters most.

scheduleTemplate.title: Gates Open
scheduleTemplate.desc: Outer gates and concourse movement begin across the MCG perimeter.

scheduleTemplate.title: Captains & Warmups
scheduleTemplate.desc: Pre-match activity builds while food queues begin spreading around the bowl.

scheduleTemplate.title: First Innings
scheduleTemplate.desc: Most crowd movement settles once play starts.

scheduleTemplate.title: Innings Break
scheduleTemplate.desc: The busiest movement window for food, drinks, and restrooms.

scheduleTemplate.title: Second Innings
scheduleTemplate.desc: Fans return to seats and circulation pressure eases again.

scheduleTemplate.title: Match End (Est.)
scheduleTemplate.desc: Short ceremony and presentation window before exit flow begins.

scheduleTemplate.title: Managed Exit
scheduleTemplate.desc: Rail and tram corridors intensify as gates empty in waves.

accessibility.title: Accessible Routes
accessibility.desc: Accessible paths and lifts connect the major gates, concourses, and seating areas with staff support available during arrival.

accessibility.title: Hearing Support
accessibility.desc: Guest services can help direct visitors to supported seating and hearing assistance resources during the event.

accessibility.title: Visual Assistance
accessibility.desc: Support teams can guide visitors to accessible paths, quieter routes, and information points across the venue.

accessibility.title: Accessible Seating
accessibility.desc: Accessible and companion seating positions are available throughout key stands with nearby amenities.

services.firstAidPrompt: Where is the nearest first aid station inside the MCG?
services.lostFoundPrompt: How do I report a lost item at the MCG?
services.transportPrompt: What is the best transport route when leaving the MCG after the event?
services.firstAidInfo: Medical and first-aid support is distributed near major gate approaches and concourse hubs.
services.lostFoundInfo: Lost items are routed through guest services and venue operations after events.
services.transportInfo: Jolimont and Richmond corridors can surge after the event, so staggered gate timing often saves time.

emergency.exitMessage: Follow steward guidance and use alternate gates if tram corridors are heavily loaded.
